title: v5.0.5 — Bug Fixes
message:
Critical bug fixes and gameplay improvements.

• Fixed Stock Trader sell bug — profits now calculate correctly
• Baccarat shows card placeholders before dealing
• Baccarat guide updated with explicit card values (J/Q/K = 0)
• Bomb Defuser hints now cost chips (scaled to bet size)
• Password field shows minimum requirement
• Username save shows confirmation
• APK warns before Google sign-in redirect
